com.irurueta.units.FrequencyUnit

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FrequencyUnit FrequencyFormatter.findUnit(String source)
      Attempts to determine a frequency unit within a frequency string representation.
      static FrequencyUnit FrequencyUnit.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static FrequencyUnit[] FrequencyUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type FrequencyUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Frequency.add(double value, FrequencyUnit unit)
      Adds provided frequency value and unit and updates current frequency instance.
      static double Frequency.add(double value1, FrequencyUnit unit1, double value2, FrequencyUnit unit2, FrequencyUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two frequency values and units and returns the result.
      void Frequency.add(Number value, FrequencyUnit unit)
      Adds provided frequency value and unit and updates current frequency instance.
      static Number Frequency.add(Number value1, FrequencyUnit unit1, Number value2, FrequencyUnit unit2, FrequencyUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two frequency values and units and returns the result.
      Frequency Frequency.addAndReturnNew(double value, FrequencyUnit unit, FrequencyUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided frequency value and unit and returns a new frequency instance using provided unit.
      static Frequency Frequency.addAndReturnNew(Frequency arg1, Frequency arg2, FrequencyUnit unit)
      Adds two frequency instances.
      Frequency Frequency.addAndReturnNew(Frequency f, FrequencyUnit unit)
      Adds provided frequency to current instance and returns a new frequency instance.
      Frequency Frequency.addAndReturnNew(Number value, FrequencyUnit unit, FrequencyUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided frequency value and unit and returns a new frequency instance using provided unit.
      static double FrequencyConverter.convert(double input, FrequencyUnit inputUnit, FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void FrequencyConverter.convert(Frequency frequency, FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a frequency to requested output unit.
      static void FrequencyConverter.convert(Frequency input, FrequencyUnit outputUnit, Frequency result)
      Converts a frequency to requested output unit.
      static Number FrequencyConverter.convert(Number input, FrequencyUnit inputUnit, FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Frequency FrequencyConverter.convertAndReturnNew(Frequency input, FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a frequency to requested output unit.
      String FrequencyFormatter.formatAndConvert(Number value, FrequencyUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided frequency value and unit using provided unit system.
      String FrequencyFormatter.formatAndConvertMetric(Number value, FrequencyUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided frequency value and unit using metric unit system.
      String FrequencyFormatter.getUnitSymbol(FrequencyUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.

      Subtracts provided frequency value and unit and updates current frequency instance.

      Subtracts two frequency values and units and returns the result.
